infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Modern Day Odyssey uses the camera to capture photos of the people you meet and the quests you complete.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Modern Day Odyssey lets you add photos and videos from your library to character cards and quest archive entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Modern Day Odyssey may save pixelized character avatars and quest media to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Modern Day Odyssey records audio when you capture quest videos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Modern Day Odyssey uses the camera to capture photos of the people you meet.
plugins.microphonePermission: Modern Day Odyssey records audio when you capture quest videos.

plugins.photosPermission: Modern Day Odyssey lets you add photos from your library to character cards and quest entries.
plugins.cameraPermission: Modern Day Odyssey uses the camera to capture photos for character cards and quest entries.

plugins.photosPermission: Modern Day Odyssey accesses your photos so you can add them to quest archive entries.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Modern Day Odyssey can save pixelized avatars and quest media to your library.
